card_description: Nixon is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 18 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Nixon. Context: "Dick identifies his 1974 experience as the "Second Advent," occurring pluralistically within individual minds rather than in a single visible man."
